scripts.generate: npm run generate:worker && npm run generate:static
scripts.zip: mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/trailhead-private-plugin.zip && (cd trmnl-import && zip -q ../dist/trailhead-private-plugin.zip settings.yml full.liquid half_horizontal.liquid half_vertical.liquid quadrant.liquid)
scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run validate && npm run zip
scripts.dev: npm run generate:worker && npx wrangler dev
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run generate:worker && npx wrangler deploy
